title: [cross-impl] EDHOC transcript hash mismatch Python/Rust/Zephyr
description: Recent edhoc.c:53iv and lichen-hal:s3d6 changes expose TH_2/TH_3 divergence: C uses ZCBOR bstr(H(msg1)||G_Y||C_R) vs Python cbor2(G_Y||H(msg1)) and Rust transcript_*. Causes divergent PRK/MAC/Sig in Suite 0. See explore task ses_072afe61fffedksMoRqF2nDFZ4. Matches neither RFC 9528 exact profile nor shared vectors. Affects all interop.
